name: Rolls-Royce Holdings plc
description: Rolls-Royce Holdings plc is a pre-eminent engineering company focused on world-class power and propulsion systems. The company operates through three core divisions: Civil Aerospace, Defense, and Power Systems. It is a leading provider of aircraft engines for the commercial and military sectors, as well as marine propulsion and energy solutions. With a focus on innovation and sustainability, Rolls-Royce is at the forefront of developing net-zero power solutions and advanced technologies for the global aerospace and defense markets, maintaining a significant presence in over 50 countries.
